title: Luse x Sosa - Modpack
description: This modpack contains mods that Brazilian Youtubers "Luse" and "Sosa" use on their channels.
body:
![Luse and Sosa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c572d8ca7f0dc39071ccf81b5bbfa0037d6dfc8c.png)

**This modpack contains the mods that [Luse](https://www.youtube.com/@LuseLUL) and [Sosa](https://www.youtube.com/@SosaUwU) use on their channels.**

## Performance

This modpack uses the best performance mods, such as the well-known Sodium, Iris, etc. They help your FPS, especially when running multiple programs simultaneously.

## Content Creation

This modpack is essential for **YouTubers**, with mods like Flashback, GammaUtils, Orthocamera, Freecam, etc.

![Luse and Sosa 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65f7c72b22522d24034d6738350a3463fca995c2.png)
